query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry by kommunenummer

2.description: get distinct risk class values to confirm high risk class code

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class filtered by municipality geometry

5.description: find parcels intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas
